TheUnderstudy:Planned.name: Planned
TheUnderstudy:Planned.description: When a card becomes [gold]Planned[/gold], it also becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. Some cards can play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
TheUnderstudy:Intense.name: Intense
TheUnderstudy:Intense.description: Becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold] when played. Increase [gold]Block[/gold] and damage by 1 for each card with [gold]Intense[/gold] this combat.
TheUnderstudy:Unplayable.name: Unplayable
